channel.title: 6. Self-Assessment :: Báo cáo thực tập
channel.description: During my internship at Amazon Web Services Vietnam LLC from 20/04/2026 to 05/07/2026, I had the opportunity to learn, practice, and apply the knowledge acquired at school in a real-world working environment. I participated in data analysis and Cloud AI infrastructure setup projects, thereby improving my skills in programming, analyzing, report writing, and communication…. In terms of professionalism, I always strive to complete assigned tasks well, comply with regulations, and actively communicate with colleagues to improve work efficiency.
